center.name: 罗马
center.summary: 罗马是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cirl bunting，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ideal farmland habitat is a mixture of grass and arable fields, divided by thick hedgerows with pockets of dense scrub. They can tolerate a certain degree of urbanisation, and are found in green spaces in towns and cities, even Rome. They are sedentary in nature and will often travel only from their nests to forage in summer, and up to in winter to find stubble
